name: Basic Crepes- Great Chefs
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the flour, sugar, eggs, and milk in a bowl. Beat until smooth. The resulting batter should have the consistency of thin cream.
2. Add oil to the batter and mix lightly.
3. Grease an 8-inch crepe pan or frying pan lightly with butter. Heat until the butter is quite hot but not burned.
4. Pour about 1/3 cup (or a bit less) of the batter into the pan, rotating it to spread the batter evenly. Cook until firm and lightly browned at the edges (about 1 minute).
5. Turn the crepe over with a thin spatula or your fingers and cook for about 30 seconds on the other side.
6. Grease the pan with more butter every other crepe, or when the crepes begin to stick.
7. Repeat until the batter is used up.
